name: EdwBhiMbrCobItemSplitxcomdsLd

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT A.BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, A.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, A.MBR_ID, A.CONSIS_MBR_ID, A.TRACEABILITY_FLD, A.MBR_DOB, A.MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, A.MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, A.MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, A.MBR_GNDR, A.MBR_CONFITY_CD, A.ACCT, A.GRP_ID, A.SUBGRP_ID, A.COV_BEG_DT, A.COV_END_DT, A.MBR_RELSHP, A.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, A.SUB_ID, A.ENR_ELIG_STTUS, CASE WHEN B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY IS NULL THEN 'P' ELSE A.MBR_MED_COB_CD END AS MBR_MED_COB_CD, CASE WHEN B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY IS NULL THEN 'P' ELSE A.MBR_PDX_COB_CD END AS MBR_PDX_COB_CD, A.DEDCT_CAT, A.MHCD_ENR_BNF, A.PDX_BNF_IN, A.MHCD_BNF_IN, A.MED_BNF_IN, A.HOSP_BNF_IN, A.BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, A.BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, A.PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, A.PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, A.PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, A.PDX_BNF_TIERS, A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, A.PROD_SK, A.PROD_SH_NM, B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY_1 FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_ENR_SPLT A LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT B ON A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AND A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK = B.MBR_EFF_DT_SK AND A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK = B.MBR_TERM_DT_SK) SELECT T.BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, T.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, T.MBR_ID, T.CONSIS_MBR_ID, T.TRACEABILITY_FLD, T.MBR_DOB, T.MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, T.MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, T.MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, T.MBR_GNDR, T.MBR_CONFITY_CD, T.ACCT, T.GRP_ID, T.SUBGRP_ID, T.COV_BEG_DT, T.COV_END_DT, T.MBR_RELSHP, T.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, T.SUB_ID, T.ENR_ELIG_STTUS, T.MBR_MED_COB_CD, T.MBR_PDX_COB_CD, T.DEDCT_CAT, T.MHCD_ENR_BNF, T.PDX_BNF_IN, T.MHCD_BNF_IN, T.MED_BNF_IN, T.HOSP_BNF_IN, T.BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, T.BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, T.PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, T.PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, T.PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, T.PDX_BNF_TIERS, T.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, T.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, T.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, T.PROD_SK, T.PROD_SH_NM FROM cte1 T WHERE T.MBR_UNIQ_KEY_1 IS NULL OR T.MBR_MED_COB_CD = 'S'
